name: upper
description: Converts string to uppercase.

name: lower
description: Converts string to lowercase.

name: title
description: Capitalizes first letter of each word.

name: capitalize
description: Capitalizes the first character and lowercases the rest.

name: trim
description: Removes leading and trailing whitespace.

name: lstrip
description: Removes leading whitespace.

name: rstrip
description: Removes trailing whitespace.

name: replace
description: Replaces occurrences of a substring. replace(old, new) or replace(old, new, count).

name: truncate
description: Truncates string to the given length, appending suffix (default '...'). truncate(length) or truncate(length, suffix).

name: center
description: Centers string within given width, padding with fill character (default space). center(width) or center(width, fill).

name: ljust
description: Left-justifies string within given width. ljust(width) or ljust(width, fill).

name: rjust
description: Right-justifies string within given width. rjust(width) or rjust(width, fill).

name: split
description: Splits string into a list by delimiter (default space). split(delimiter).

name: wordcount
description: Returns the number of words in the string.

name: length
description: Returns length of string, list, or map.

name: first
description: Returns first element of a list.

name: last
description: Returns last element of a list.

name: join
description: Joins list elements with a separator string. join(separator).

name: sort
description: Sorts list elements lexicographically.

name: reverse
description: Reverses a list or string.

name: unique
description: Removes duplicate elements from a list.

name: min
description: Returns the minimum value in a list.

name: max
description: Returns the maximum value in a list.

name: sum
description: Sums all numeric elements in a list.

name: map
description: Extracts an attribute from each item in a list. map(attribute).

name: batch
description: Splits list into batches of given size. batch(size).

name: flatten
description: Flattens one level of nested lists.

name: keys
description: Returns the keys of a map as a sorted list.

name: values
description: Returns the values of a map as a list.

name: abs
description: Returns the absolute value of a number.

name: round
description: Rounds to given decimal places (default 0). round(precision).

name: ceil
description: Rounds a number up to the nearest integer.

name: floor
description: Rounds a number down to the nearest integer.

name: int
description: Converts value to integer (truncates floats).

name: float
description: Converts value to float.

name: default
description: Returns the fallback value if input is nil or falsy. default(fallback).

name: string
description: Converts value to its string representation.

name: bool
description: Converts value to boolean.

name: safe
description: Marks HTML content as safe, bypassing auto-escaping.

name: escape
description: HTML-escapes a string (converts <, >, &, etc.).

name: striptags
description: Strips all HTML tags from a string.

name: nl2br
description: Converts newline characters to HTML <br> tags.
